overall.description: A cinematic game engine shot of an ornate gothic wizarding council chamber featuring a large circular table, towering stained glass windows, and robed figures seated in discussion. The camera remains static throughout the clip, briefly interrupted by a foreground character entering and exiting the bottom of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic council chamber with circular meeting table

agents.ego_description: stationary camera positioned at chest height observing the council chamber and seated figures

notable_agents.action: robed figure seated at the left side of the circular table, facing inward
robed figure seated at the right side of the circular table, remaining still

entered.detail: large ornate circular wooden table with glowing blue inlays and golden trim
tall pointed arch windows with circular stained glass tops emitting bright blue daylight
elaborate golden chandelier with multiple lanterns hanging from the domed ceiling
framed tapestries or paintings mounted on the left wall depicting figures
intricate blue stone archways with gold trim framing the windows and ceiling

segments.scene_description: The video opens on a static view of an ornate gothic council chamber. A large circular table dominates the center, surrounded by robed figures seated in discussion. Tall stained glass windows cast blue light across the marble floor, while an elaborate golden chandelier hangs from the vaulted ceiling.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic council chamber with circular meeting table

events.description: foreground character enters from bottom of frame, partially obscuring the view of the table
foreground character exits downward, returning to clear view of the chamber

agents.ego_description: maintaining static observation while a foreground character briefly enters and exits the bottom of the frame

notable_agents.action: character with dark hair entering from below, looking up at the council, then exiting downward
seated council member in dark robes remaining stationary throughout the segment

segments.scene_description: The scene continues with the static council chamber view. At approximately 14 seconds, a foreground character enters from the bottom of the frame, partially blocking the view for several seconds before exiting. The background figures remain seated at the circular table, and the gothic architecture with its stained glass windows remains unchanged throughout the remainder of the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, wide perspective of an ornate gothic council chamber that remains constant despite a brief foreground interruption. It begins with a view of a large circular table where robed figures are seated in discussion, illuminated by blue light streaming through tall stained glass windows and a golden chandelier hanging from the vaulted ceiling. As the scene persists, a foreground character enters from the bottom of the frame, momentarily obscuring the view of the marble floor and the seated council. The camera then reveals the chamber once more as the character exits, returning the focus to the unchanging gothic architecture and the figures gathered at the table.
